scripts.heroku-postbuild: npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm --prefix client test
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:server:coverage && npm --prefix client run test:coverage
scripts.test:emulators: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=/tmp/firebase-config npm_config_cache=/tmp/npm-cache npx firebase-tools@13 emulators:exec --project demo-phantom-reboot --only auth,firestore,storage "npm run emulators:seed && npm --prefix client run test:integration"
